title: astragalus strictifolius subsp. stenonychioides
intro: Astragalus strictifolius subsp. stenonychioides, also known as Astragalus stenonychioides, is a species of plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with a long history of traditional use in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory infections. Astragalus stenonychioides can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide additional health benefits.
